🍪 We use essential cookies to make our calculators work and optional analytics cookies to improve the site.

  1. Home
  2. Cookie Policy

Cookie Policy

Last updated: May 2026

What Are Cookies?

Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the site remember your preferences and improve your experience.

Essential Cookies

These are necessary for the site to function properly.

Language preference: Stored in localStorage (not a traditional cookie). Remembers your language choice between visits.

Cookie consent: Stores your cookie preference so we don't ask you again on every visit.

Analytics Cookies

These help us understand how visitors use our site so we can improve it.

  • _ga: Distinguishes unique visitors. Expires after 2 years.
  • _gid: Distinguishes unique visitors per day. Expires after 24 hours.

Analytics cookies are only set after you provide consent via the cookie banner.

Advertising Cookies

In the future, Google AdSense may set cookies to serve personalized advertisements.

Advertising cookies will only be set after you provide consent.

You can opt out of personalized advertising through Google's Ad Settings.

Managing Your Cookie Preferences

You can change your cookie preferences at any time using the cookie banner or the settings link in the footer.

You can also control cookies through your browser settings. Note that disabling all cookies may affect site functionality.

For more information about online tracking and your rights, visit your local data protection authority's website.

Privacy Terms Disclaimer Cookies

© 2026 TurfCalculator. Free lawn calculators for everyone.
